fix_summary: Localized origin search normalization in `search_flights` now uppercases incoming origin values before comparison, and the added tests cover lowercase, mixed-case, and uppercase origin queries. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation directly addresses the reported bug by normalizing only the origin filter, preserving the rest of the flight search behavior.
Destination filtering remains unchanged, matching the stated scope and acceptance criteria.
Automated test results passed (6/6), indicating the change is working as intended in the current test suite.
